sgd:source:delta.description: Use two git commit reference to generate the package corresponding to what has changed in between
examples:
- Build incremental manifest from the previous commit

<%= config.bin %> <%= command.id %> --from "origin/development" --output-dir incremental

- Build incremental manifest and source from the development branch

<%= config.bin %> <%= command.id %> --from "origin/development" --generate-delta --output-dir incremental

flags-dir.name: flags-dir
flags-dir.summary: Import flag values from a directory.

from.name: from
from.summary: commit sha from where the diff is done

to.name: to
to.summary: commit sha to where the diff is done

source-dir.description:
You can use this flag multiple times to include different folders that contain source files. Each path should be relative to --repo-dir.

The folder can exist or not.
* If the folder exists, its contents will be processed.
* If the folder doesn't exist, it usually won't show any output—unless the folder was recently deleted and is part of a diff, in which case changes may still be picked up.
source-dir.name: source-dir
source-dir.summary: source folders focus location relative to --repo-dir

ignore-file.name: ignore-file
ignore-file.summary: file listing paths to explicitly ignore for any diff actions

ignore-destructive-file.name: ignore-destructive-file
ignore-destructive-file.summary: file listing paths to explicitly ignore for any destructive actions

include-file.name: include-file
include-file.summary: file listing paths to explicitly include for any diff actions

include-destructive-file.name: include-destructive-file
include-destructive-file.summary: file listing paths to explicitly include for any destructive actions

additional-metadata-registry.name: additional-metadata-registry
additional-metadata-registry.summary: file containing additional metadata definitions to add to the registry

ignore-whitespace.name: ignore-whitespace
ignore-whitespace.summary: ignore git diff whitespace (space, tab, eol) changes

api-version.description: Override the api version used for api requests made by this command
api-version.name: api-version
api-version.summary: salesforce metadata API version, default to sfdx-project.json "sourceApiVersion" attribute or latest version

sgd:source:delta.summary: Generate incremental package manifest and source content
